reply:
```repl
text = CONTEXT.read(0, None)
import re
m = re.search(r'ROW:\s*([0-9]+)', text)
if not m:
    result = "INVALID"
else:
    row = m.group(1).strip()
    if len(row) == 9 and set(row) == set("123456789"):
        result = "OK"
    else:
        result = "INVALID"
done(result)
```
